final:
module sync_counter (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] count);
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};

always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (enable) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end
endmodule
